narrative:
Putnam County has 23,528 registered voters, with 51.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.0 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.9% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -21.9% D−R vs -35.5% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
